# os-hcl-design

> Apple-inspired design system codified as machine-readable context for AI coding agents. Foundations, DTCG v1 tokens, Tailwind v4 reference components, and composed patterns — authored for Claude Code and other AI consumers first, human readers second.

## Foundations

- [Principles](foundations/principles.md): Deference, Clarity, Depth plus the hard-constraint table (weights, accents, hit targets, contrast, reduced motion/transparency).
- [Typography](foundations/typography.md): `-apple-system` font stack, fluid type role scale (caption2 → hero-lg), hero tracking, weight discipline.
- [Color](foundations/color.md): semantic token roles (text, surface, separator, border, action, accent) with light/dark/high-contrast modes.
- [Spacing](foundations/spacing.md): 4/8pt scale, layout margins, section rhythm, 65ch body measure, bento grid gaps.
- [Motion](foundations/motion.md): duration + spring-easing tokens, reduced-motion contract, scroll-driven patterns.
- [Materials](foundations/materials.md): Liquid-Glass web approximation, three tiers, mandatory solid fallback, reduced-transparency contract.
- [Accessibility](foundations/accessibility.md): WCAG 2.1 AA, focus-visible rings, 44px hit targets, keyboard map, Dynamic Type equivalence.
- [Component template](foundations/component-template.md): canonical 11-section structure for every component/pattern `.md`.

## Tokens (DTCG v1 JSON)

- [Primitive tokens](tokens/primitive.tokens.json): 8 color ramps × 11 steps + spacing + radii + shadows + type scale + motion.
- [Semantic tokens](tokens/semantic.tokens.json): role-named aliases with light/dark/high-contrast mode extensions.
- [Component tokens](tokens/component.tokens.json): per-component overrides (semantic-only references).

## Components

- [Button](components/button/button.md): primary / secondary / ghost / destructive, 3 sizes, 44px floor, focus-visible ring.
- [Card](components/card/card.md): default / elevated / outlined / glass variants, compound sub-components.

## Patterns

- [Hero + Feature Grid](patterns/hero-feature-grid/hero-feature-grid.md): full-bleed hero with sticky glass nav + 3-column bento grid of Cards.

## Quality gates

CI enforces: TypeScript strict, ESLint (raw-hex ban, no arbitrary values, no `dark:` prefixes in component code), stylelint (semantic tokens only), Prettier class ordering, depth-check (every component dir has all 5 sibling files), 11-section doc check, AGENTS.md ≤ 2048 bytes, WCAG token-contrast per mode, Storybook axe a11y pass, Playwright visual regression (default / dark / reduced-motion / reduced-transparency variants), CSS bundle < 15 KB gzip, keyboard activation + hit-target verification.
